snippet.title: ARK Tides of Fortune & Dragontopia Trailer
snippet.description:
Set sail, take flight, and step into two massive new ARK adventures: ARK Tides of Fortune and ARK: Dragontopia, each bringing a distinct new frontier of survival, exploration, creatures, combat, and progression to the ARK universe.

ARK Tides of Fortune

Pull up a chair, Survivors. Everyone knows the legendary ARK veteran Bob - played by Karl Urban - but you haven't truly heard a tale until you've survived his swashbuckling exploits on the high seas. Hoist the sails and experience his next chapter of incredibly true adventures in ARK Tides of Fortune!

The simulated ocean of Genesis Ascended Part 1 has opened into a massive, map-wide nautical frontier. Chart a course across a vast sea, hunt for buried treasure, and clash with treacherous enemies in explosive naval combat. The new weapons, structures, cosmetics, and exotic creatures included in Tides of Fortune can be unleashed across the ARK universe, but the deep physics-driven waters of Genesis are where this swashbuckling arsenal truly comes alive. 

ARK Tides of Fortune - Steam
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4558480/ARK_Tides_of_Fortune/

ARK Tides of Fortune - Xbox
https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/ark-tides-of-fortune/9NW717HPJDK9

ARK Tides of Fortune - PlayStation
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP0691-PPSA16810_00-TIDESOFFORTUNE01


ARK: Dragontopia

Tame the legends and rule the skies!

Awaken within a cloudbound paradise where the earth has fractured into a world of floating islands, and myths take flight. High above these magical grounds, Survivors must learn a new rhythm of survival alongside the true rulers of the sky: dragons. Across a vast aerial ecosystem, ARK: Dragontopia invites you to step off the edge and master the skies. Guided by the echoes of a lost order of dragonriders, you’ll enter a land where legends breathe anew. As a fierce new threat claims the horizon, it is up to you to restore balance!

LORDS OF THE SKY
Between the sun and moon, the skies teem with draconic legends. Encounter titanic behemoths that devour resources and enemies alike, elegant wind-dancing steeds that gallop across the clouds, deadly four-winged assassins, multi-headed beasts of dual-breathed chaos, and loyal shoulder-drakes that guard you on your journey. Every dragon demands its own path to taming, requiring you to observe, learn, and master their unique rhythms before they ever let you take the saddle.

THE DRAGONTOPIA ECOSYSTEM
To survive this high-altitude frontier, you’ll need to grow through the Dragon Skill Trees, a new progression system built around strengthening your bond with these mythical beasts. Craft specialized gear, wield potent tools, and expand your base with a draconic tileset, incubator backpacks, and mysterious potion stations. But these skies are contested, and you are the realm’s last hope to break the vanguard of a ruthless airborne invader!
The dragons are waking, the islands are calling, and the Skies of Dragontopia are yours to claim!

Dragonntopia - Steam
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4558490/ARK_Dragontopia/

localized.title: ARK Tides of Fortune & Dragontopia Trailer
localized.description:
Set sail, take flight, and step into two massive new ARK adventures: ARK Tides of Fortune and ARK: Dragontopia, each bringing a distinct new frontier of survival, exploration, creatures, combat, and progression to the ARK universe.

ARK Tides of Fortune

Pull up a chair, Survivors. Everyone knows the legendary ARK veteran Bob - played by Karl Urban - but you haven't truly heard a tale until you've survived his swashbuckling exploits on the high seas. Hoist the sails and experience his next chapter of incredibly true adventures in ARK Tides of Fortune!

The simulated ocean of Genesis Ascended Part 1 has opened into a massive, map-wide nautical frontier. Chart a course across a vast sea, hunt for buried treasure, and clash with treacherous enemies in explosive naval combat. The new weapons, structures, cosmetics, and exotic creatures included in Tides of Fortune can be unleashed across the ARK universe, but the deep physics-driven waters of Genesis are where this swashbuckling arsenal truly comes alive. 

ARK Tides of Fortune - Steam
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4558480/ARK_Tides_of_Fortune/

ARK Tides of Fortune - Xbox
https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/ark-tides-of-fortune/9NW717HPJDK9

ARK Tides of Fortune - PlayStation
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP0691-PPSA16810_00-TIDESOFFORTUNE01


ARK: Dragontopia

Tame the legends and rule the skies!

Awaken within a cloudbound paradise where the earth has fractured into a world of floating islands, and myths take flight. High above these magical grounds, Survivors must learn a new rhythm of survival alongside the true rulers of the sky: dragons. Across a vast aerial ecosystem, ARK: Dragontopia invites you to step off the edge and master the skies. Guided by the echoes of a lost order of dragonriders, you’ll enter a land where legends breathe anew. As a fierce new threat claims the horizon, it is up to you to restore balance!

LORDS OF THE SKY
Between the sun and moon, the skies teem with draconic legends. Encounter titanic behemoths that devour resources and enemies alike, elegant wind-dancing steeds that gallop across the clouds, deadly four-winged assassins, multi-headed beasts of dual-breathed chaos, and loyal shoulder-drakes that guard you on your journey. Every dragon demands its own path to taming, requiring you to observe, learn, and master their unique rhythms before they ever let you take the saddle.

THE DRAGONTOPIA ECOSYSTEM
To survive this high-altitude frontier, you’ll need to grow through the Dragon Skill Trees, a new progression system built around strengthening your bond with these mythical beasts. Craft specialized gear, wield potent tools, and expand your base with a draconic tileset, incubator backpacks, and mysterious potion stations. But these skies are contested, and you are the realm’s last hope to break the vanguard of a ruthless airborne invader!
The dragons are waking, the islands are calling, and the Skies of Dragontopia are yours to claim!

snippet.description:
اغنية منتخب مصر في كاس العالم 2026 | من ماتش مصر وبلجيكا |  FIFA World Cup 2026 egy song


شاهد أجواء افتتاح مشوار منتخب مصر في كأس العالم 2026 عبر لقطات حصرية من داخل الملعب وتجمعات الجماهير. استعد لتعيش لحظات الحماس.

يستعرض هذا الفيديو كواليس انطلاقة منتخب مصر في منافسات كأس العالم 2026، حيث يركز على التفاعل الجماهيري الكبير الذي صاحب المباراة. إذا كنت من عشاق كرة القدم وتود متابعة تفاصيل الحدث، فهذا التقرير ينقل لك نبض الشارع والمدرجات في قلب الحدث.

تغطي اللقطات تواجد المشجعين أمام شاشات العرض الكبيرة وتفاعلهم مع مجريات اللقاء، بالإضافة إلى صور حصرية للاعبين أثناء تواجدهم داخل الملعب. نهدف من خلال هذه التغطية إلى وضعك في قلب مشوار منتخب مصر، موثقين لحظات الاحتفال والصخب الجماهيري التي ميزت هذا اليوم التاريخي ضمن مباريات كأس العالم.

اشترك في القناة لمتابعة المزيد من تغطيات مباريات كأس العالم، وأخبرنا في التعليقات عن توقعاتك لمسيرة الفريق في البطولة القادمة.

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

snippet.title: Koi Nhi Mere Pass – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Koi Nhi Mere Pass – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Koi nhi mere pass...
bas teri yaadein reh gayi hain.

Jise apna sab kuch maana tha...
aaj wahi sabse door ho gaya.

Ab na koi humsafar hai...
na koi apna kehne wala...
bas tanhai hai
aur kuch adhure ehsaas hain.

“Koi Nhi Mere Pass”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo mohabbat me toot kar
tanha reh gaya.

Bahut log mile zindagi me...
magar dil ne sirf tumhe apna maana tha.

Aaj jab tum nahi ho...
to lagta hai jaise
mere paas kuch bhi nahi bacha.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
tanhai bhi hai,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

koi nhi mere pass...
bas teri yaadein mere saath hain...

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se zyada chaha ho
aur uske jaane ke baad tanha reh gaye ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan

النمشيها - مراجلنا تتمدد - من امشي بشارع ما اسأل - اشرب ازيد بكاسي 
اتعب ويثقل راسي - انعل ابو الفقر والمعاش الردى - كاسر 
خشم الي يتحداني - احنا نسير القوافل ونمشيها - كلشي حب لهالدنيا 
صدام وينك صدام - انت القلب وانت الروح - زيد الثلج هز الكاس 
اكسر شوكتها - سورى انا - هيبة من نمشي ضباط - رجعتلكم بعد غياب 
احنا الدولة والهيبه - احنا الهيبة من الله - انت هدية من ربي - الهدف 
مرصود والرشاش جاهز- تجي نتزوج بالسر  
العلاسة - يخرب بيتك عيد - بحظيني نامي .

snippet.title: محاولة تختيم ماب الكيبورد مع علوشي... وطفرنا!⌨️💸| Roblox
snippet.description:
سيرفر الديسكورد
https://discord.gg/gN4xRztjky  
------------------------------------
اليوم قررت أنا وعلوشي نحاول نختم ماب الكيبورد في روبلوكس! ⌨️✨
في البداية توقعت إن الموضوع بيكون سهل... لكن مع الوقت اكتشفت إن الماب أصعب بكثير مما تخيلت 😭💀
خلال التحدي صرفنا روبوكس كثير، واشترينا أشياء غالية عشان نكمل ونحاول نتقدم أكثر 💸😵‍💫، ومع كل مرحلة كنت أفقد الأمل أكثر وأكثر 😂
هل قدرنا نختم الماب كامل؟ 🤔
ولا انتهى بنا الأمر مطفرين وما ختمنا إلا جزء بسيط؟ 😭
شاهدوا المقطع للنهاية لأن فيه لحظات مضحكة، صراخ، انفعالات، ومواقف عشوائية بيني وبين علوشي ما توقعتها أبدًا! 💖
⭐ إذا استمتعت بالمقطع لا تنسَ:
👍 لايك
🔔 اشتراك وتفعيل الجرس
💬 واكتب في التعليقات: هل سبق ولعبت ماب الكيبورد؟ وقدرت تختمه؟

💗 Roblox: Ro1i_144
